message.content:
@startuml
package EntityModule as EntityModule
    class EntityAPIController as EntityAPIController
    class DrupalDefaultEntityController as DrupalDefaultEntityController

    EntityAPIController ..> DrupalDefaultEntityController

package CommerceModule as CommerceModule
    class DrupalCommerceEntityController as DrupalCommerceEntityController
    class CommerceCustomerProfileEntityController as CommerceCustomerProfileEntityController
    class CommerceLineItemEntityController as CommerceLineItemEntityController
    class CommercePaymentTransactionEntityController as CommercePaymentTransactionEntityController
    class CommerceProductEntityController as CommerceProductEntityController
    class CommerceOrderEntityController as CommerceOrderEntityController

    DrupalCommerceEntityController ..> DrupalDefaultEntityController
    DrupalCommerceEntityController ..> CommerceCustomerProfileEntityController
    DrupalCommerceEntityController ..> CommerceLineItemEntityController
    DrupalCommerceEntityController ..> CommercePaymentTransactionEntityController
    DrupalCommerceEntityController ..> CommerceProductEntityController
    DrupalCommerceEntityController ..> CommerceOrderEntityController

@enduml
